scripts.lint: eslint . --ext .js,.ts --ignore-path .eslintignore && npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace mobile
scripts.lint:fix: eslint . --ext .js,.ts --fix --ignore-path .eslintignore && npm run lint:fix --workspace backend && npm run lint:fix --workspace mobile
scripts.format: prettier --write "**/*.{js,ts,json,md}" --ignore-path .prettierignore && npm run format --workspace backend && npm run format --workspace mobile
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "**/*.{js,ts,json,md}" --ignore-path .prettierignore && npm run format:check --workspace backend && npm run format:check --workspace mobile
